title: citrus × voangasay
intro: Citrus × voangasay, also known as the Voatsiperifery tree, is a species of citrus plant native to the island of Madagascar. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headaches, and digestive issues. The essential oil extracted from the Citrus × voangasay plant is rich in limonene and beta-pinene, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant. Citrus × voangasay essential oil is often prepared through steam distillation and used in herbal remedies, as well as in aromatherapy applications.
